name: Coeurs a La Creme
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the cream cheese, soured cream, and sugar thoroughly until well mixed.
2. Whisk the egg whites until they form stiff peaks.
3. Gently fold the whisked egg whites into the cream mixture to incorporate air without deflating the eggs.
4. Line small dishes or ramekins with parchment paper.
5. Carefully pour the batter into each dish, filling them almost to the top.
6. Cover each dish tightly with plastic wrap.
7. Refrigerate for at least 8 hours, ideally overnight, allowing the mixture to set and drain excess liquid in a cool place.
8. When ready to serve, arrange fruit of your choice, such as raspberries and redcurrants, on top of each dish.
9. Spoon about 1 tablespoon of double cream over each serving before serving.
This version maintains the original recipe's title, ingredients, and instructions while ensuring clarity, consistency, and adherence to the specified formatting rules.
